title: 11 Herbal Essential Oils For Ulcerative Colitis
description: Silybum marianum essential oils contains bioactive constituents like silymarin, silibinin, and silidianin, which are known for their anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, a key factor in ulcerative colitis. Silymarin also has antioxidant properties, which protect the gut lining from damage and promote healing.
